title: senecio ragazzii
intro: Senecio ragazzii, also known as Ragazzia, is a plant species within the daisy family that is native to certain regions. The plant contains sesquiterpene lactones, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Traditionally, Senecio ragazzii has been used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, and its health benefits include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses, although its preparation and consumption should be done under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
